_description: Mapping of Kalshi prediction markets to NDX100 equity tickers for cross-system hedging
_usage: DIAMOND anomaly scores on these markets can serve as leading indicators for CITRINE regime transitions
_version: 0.1.0 — initial manual mapping, expand as Kalshi adds markets

macro_indicators._note: These affect broad NDX100, not individual tickers

fed_rate.rationale: Rate hikes compress growth equity valuations

cpi.rationale: High CPI → expected rate hikes → growth selloff

gdp.rationale: Strong GDP supports earnings growth expectations

chip_export.rationale: Export restrictions reduce TAM for semiconductor companies

integration_plan.phase_1: Map Kalshi market tickers to equity tickers using this file
integration_plan.phase_2: When DIAMOND detects anomaly on mapped market, inject signal into CITRINE as alt_data_boost modifier
integration_plan.phase_3: Track correlation between DIAMOND anomaly timing and CITRINE regime transitions
integration_plan.phase_4: If correlation > 0.3, use DIAMOND anomalies as leading prior for HMM transition matrix A
